notes: Daily series — flag if no observation in the last 5 days. Allows for weekend + 1 holiday tolerance.
Weekly series (e.g. FRED MORTGAGE30US) — flag if no observation in the last 10 days.
Monthly series — flag if no observation in 45+ days. Covers month-end publication delay (most monthly series publish 2-4 weeks after period end) plus headroom for skipped months.
Quarterly series (e.g. SLOOS surveys) — flag if no observation in 120+ days. Covers ~1 quarter of publication lag.

column4: IMF GDP) — flag if no observation in 540+ days. Covers annual-vintage 12-month publication lag plus 6-month tolerance.
